Purpose: Store master - 10 store definitions with addresses and timezone
Upload_Via: Web Portal > Stores > Import OR API POST /api/stores
Validation_Rules: store_code must be unique; erp_store_code must match ERP system exactly; timezone must be IANA format (Asia/Kolkata)

Purpose: Product catalog - all SKUs with EAN and ERP codes
Upload_Via: Web Portal > Products > Import OR API POST /api/products
Validation_Rules: SKU must be unique; RFID_Enabled must be TRUE for RFID tracking; Category must match system category codes; EAN must be 13 digits

Purpose: User accounts - 1 manager + 2 associates per store (30 total)
Upload_Via: Web Portal > Users > Import OR API POST /api/auth/users
Validation_Rules: username must be unique globally; role must be STORE_MANAGER or STORE_ASSOCIATE; store_code must exist in T1

Purpose: EPC tag encoding list - one row per physical RFID tag
Fill_Before_Onboarding: YES - from tag encoding station/label printer
Upload_Via: Upload to inventory-service OR use as source for T5
Validation_Rules: EPC must be 24 hex chars uppercase; EPC must be globally unique across ALL stores; SKU must exist in T2

Purpose: ERP opening stock - one row per EPC per store
Fill_Before_Onboarding: YES - one file per store (10 files total)
Upload_Via: Web Portal > ERP Integration > Upload (select store)
Validation_Rules: STORE_CODE must match erp_store_code in T1; EPC must be unique (no EPC in 2 stores); ZONE must be SALES_FLOOR or BACK_ROOM or FITTING_ROOM; SKU must exist in T2

Purpose: Zone configuration - all zones per store
Fill_Before_Onboarding: YES - defines zone structure before scan
Validation_Rules: zone_type must be: floor or backroom or fitting_room or stockroom or display or entrance; zone_code must be unique within a store

Purpose: RFID device registration - Chainway C72 devices
Fill_Before_Onboarding: YES - register before first SOH scan
Validation_Rules: reader_code must be unique; device_model must match supported hardware list; ip_address must be on store LAN
